title: Add checkRateLimit utility function
description: Create `checkRateLimit(key: string, maxRequests: number, windowMs: number): { allowed: boolean; retryAfter?: number }` in `src/auth/rate-limiter-utils.ts` using an in-memory Map. Implement a fixed-window rate limiting algorithm that tracks request counts per key within a time window. Add comprehensive tests covering: allow under limit, reject over limit, window expiry reset, multiple independent keys, and retryAfter calculation.
existing_patterns: src/middleware/rate-limiter.ts:SlidingWindowRateLimiter - in-memory Map-based rate limiting with timestamps array
src/auth/_auth.ts - auth utility module with simple exported functions
